calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Petitioner: Hong Yong Chen, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Manson Cheng and Wendy Cheng, was sworn and examined.
Co-Petitioner/Minors' Mother: Xiu Lo, not present, but signed the Petition consenting to the name change of the two minors.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minors were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Manson Chen and Wendy Chen.
Decree signed in open court.
